race.comment: EGYPTOLOGIST (1) caught the eye in fourth two starts back at Orange, then put it all together last start at Wellington when sent forward and keeping them all at bay. Strips fitter fourth-up out to 2000m and can repeat the dose. TAVIJEWEL (6) also went forward last time out and proved too strong last time out over 2200m at Dubbo. Gets in light with the claim and should be in this for a long way again. LUCKY STAR (5) let down nicely in the lane last start to arrive just in time and pay his supporters. The rise in trip shouldn't bother and he looks to get a suitable tempo to be running on again. CROWN LEGEND (4) was in contention on the corner and never gave in to finish a close third over 1800m at Bathurst. Gets weight off from that and has a senior hoop in Bell taking over. Not dismissing. BLAZING GURU (2) quickly drops back to the 2000m after an even effort at Dubbo. Holds definite place claims.
